metadata.title: Document Versioning Workflow Solution - Technical Specification
metadata.author: Technical Architecture Team

executiveSummary.description: This technical specification defines the requirements, architecture, and implementation plan for the Document Versioning Workflow Solution. It provides a structured, auditable process for uploading document updates, performing side-by-side change reviews, adding version notes, managing publication states, and creating successive document versions.
keyBenefits: Reduced errors through mandatory diff review and note-taking
Full audit trail via author, date, and notes metadata
Clear status management (Draft/In Progress → Under Review → Approved/Published)
One-click creation of new versions post-publication

introduction.purpose: Deliver a user-centric workflow interface that replaces ad-hoc document update practices with a controlled, versioned process.

inScope: Real-time upload progress, visual diff rendering, and state machine
outOfScope: Backend document storage, OCR, or full-text search

assumptionsAndConstraints: Users authenticate via existing corporate SSO
Documents are stored in a central repository with API access
Operates as a frontend module within a larger DMS

uploadUpdate.fr_1_1: Support drag-and-drop and file browser selection for supported formats
uploadUpdate.fr_1_2: Display real-time upload progress bar (0–100%) with status text
uploadUpdate.fr_1_3: Show green checkmark and confirmation message on successful upload
uploadUpdate.fr_1_4: Validate file type and size (max 50 MB)

reviewChanges.fr_2_1: Render side-by-side diff view: Previous Version vs New Version
reviewChanges.fr_2_2: Apply visual highlighting (green = insertions, red = deletions)
reviewChanges.fr_2_3: Indicate completion status and provide zoom/pan controls

addNotes.fr_3_1: Present structured form with Version Notes (required), Author, and Date
addNotes.fr_3_2: Save Draft button persists notes and transitions status

publish.fr_4_1: Display version status pills with color coding
publish.fr_4_2: Enable Sign-off action for authorized roles
publish.fr_4_3: Automatically update status to Approved/Published upon approval

createNewVersion.fr_5_3: Archive current version, increment version number, reset workflow
createNewVersion.fr_5_4: Maintain immutable history of all prior versions

uiLayout.description: Horizontal five-panel workflow with central content area and right-hand version history sidebar

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Upload of 50 MB file completes with progress feedback
New user completes full workflow without training
Zero data loss on version finalization
Role-based access control + encryption at rest

implementationRoadmap.phase2: Weeks 5–9: Notes, publish workflow, and version history (Steps 3–4)
implementationRoadmap.phase3: Weeks 10–14: New version creation, full integration, and hardening

glossary.Diff: Visual representation of changes between two document versions
glossary.Sign-off: Formal approval action that transitions status to Published
glossary.Draft / In Progress: Initial editable state after upload or new version creation
